name: Mel i Reines — beekeeping experience (Finca Lluriach)
description: A beekeeping project by Ana Marquès and Raúl Ameller who breed native queen bees and open their hives to visitors. The experience begins in the old kitchen of the historic Lluriach estate, in Es Mercadal, before heading out into the fields.
area: Es Mercadal (Finca Lluriach, Camí de Tramuntana, hacia la costa norte)

highlights: understand the life of the hive in the kitchen of the Lluriach estate
put on the beekeeper's suit and watch the bees at work in the field
taste honey freshly extracted; small groups (max. 8 people)
